cross_scene_arcs.title: Eve's Career Advancement
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve progresses from meeting Margo Channing to becoming her understudy, then a lead actress, and finally winning an award, actively seeking roles through persuasion and opportunity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Admiring fan waiting outside the theater
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether her expressed commitment to theater is genuine or driven by personal ambition.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Manipulative Relationship Dynamics
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve builds sympathetic connections with Margo and Karen but later uses manipulation and coercion, ending in submission to Addison's control.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sympathetic figure introduced in the dressing room
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Emotionally broken and dominated by Addison
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Eve can recover autonomy or remains under Addison's influence.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Hidden Aspirations and Emotional Collapse
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve's private ambitions are revealed through mimicry, leading to emotional breakdown and detached acceptance of success.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her true motivations and emotional state remain obscured.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Exploitation of Karen's Support
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve leverages her initial connection with Karen to gain favors, eventually coercing her through blackmail for professional advancement.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Introduced to the theater world by Karen
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Forces Karen to support her casting
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Karen's compliance and potential fallout from the coercion.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Eve's Influence on Karen
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Karen introduces Eve to Margo's circle and aids her career, but Eve blackmails her, leading to personal and marital losses as Lloyd leaves for Eve.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Karen acts as a benefactor to Eve.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Karen is blackmailed and Lloyd departs for Eve.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The fallout from Eve's manipulation on Karen's life and relationships.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Lloyd and Karen's Marital Strain
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Karen and Lloyd reconcile publicly, but tensions over Eve's role escalate, ending with Lloyd choosing Eve over Karen.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Reunited with Lloyd after the ceremony.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Lloyd leaves for Eve, leaving Karen despairing.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The future of their marriage amid Lloyd's infidelity.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Karen's Scheme and Its Irony
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Karen considers using Eve to hurt Margo, is blackmailed into betraying Margo, and reacts with hysterical laughter when Margo voluntarily steps aside.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Contemplating giving Margo 'the boot in the rear.'
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Hysterical laughter at Margo's decision to decline the role.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The impact on her friendship with Margo after the forced betrayal.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Karen's Loss of Control
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Karen asserts gatekeeping authority over Eve's career but is undermined when Eve blackmails her, stripping her of control.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Active agent in Eve's advancement with authority affirmed.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Complicit and controlled by Eve through blackmail.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How Karen will manage her compromised position and autonomy.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Margo's Patronage Turns to Rivalry with Eve
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Margo initially welcomes Eve as a fan and protégée, but grows suspicious and jealous as Eve ingratiates herself with Bill and the theater circle, leading to open conflict and lasting resentment.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Margo meets Eve and invites her into her life.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Margo views Eve as a rival and makes a cutting remark at her award ceremony.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The depth of Eve's manipulation and Margo's lingering bitterness.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Margo's Insecurities and Commitment to Bill
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Margo expresses jealousy and fear of losing Bill, which escalates through arguments and observations of his closeness with Eve, culminating in her decision to leave the stage and commit to married life with him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Margo worries about Bill's fidelity and their relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Margo chooses marriage over career and leaves with Bill after the ceremony.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether their relationship can fully recover from past strains.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Margo's Identity Crisis and Retirement from Stage
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Margo, an established actress, faces professional threats from Eve's rise and personal doubts about her identity, leading her to retire from playing youthful roles and embrace a new life as a married woman.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Margo is a star in her dressing room.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Margo retires from the stage and makes a final sarcastic comment at Eve's award.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her adjustment to life outside the theater and acceptance of aging.
